summary: Permission System Audit testing complete. All 25 tests passed. The permission system fixes are working correctly: Founder has 209 permissions with is_founder=True, Admin has 209 permissions after auto-repair, permission restrictions are properly enforced.

minor.issue: Comment says '187 permissions' but actual count is 209. Documentation mismatch.

AVAILABLE_PERMISSIONS has 186 permissions while ALL_SYSTEM_PERMISSIONS has 209. This causes validation errors when updating Admin/Founder permissions with all their current permissions. The 23 extra permissions in ALL_SYSTEM_PERMISSIONS are not in AVAILABLE_PERMISSIONS.

passed_tests: Admin login returns 209 permissions after auto-repair
Founder can view any user's permissions
Admin can update non-admin user permissions
Admin CANNOT modify another Admin's permissions (403)
Admin CANNOT reset another Admin's permissions (403)
Admin with reduced permissions gets full permissions on login (auto-repair)
action_items: Update comment on line 354 from '187 permissions' to '209 permissions'
Consider syncing AVAILABLE_PERMISSIONS with ALL_SYSTEM_PERMISSIONS to avoid validation errors when updating Admin/Founder permissions
critical_code_review_comments: has_permission() correctly bypasses for role='Founder' OR role='Admin' OR email=FOUNDER_EMAIL
is_founder() correctly checks both role='Founder' AND email=FOUNDER_EMAIL
ensure_user_permissions() correctly auto-repairs Admin/Founder users to have ALL_SYSTEM_PERMISSIONS (209 perms)
Founder protection prevents removing permissions from Founder
Admin protection prevents non-Founders from modifying Admin permissions
Reset protection prevents resetting Founder/Admin permissions inappropriately
context_for_next_testing_agent: Permission system audit complete. All permission restrictions working correctly. Founder has 209 permissions with is_founder=True. Admin has 209 permissions after auto-repair. Admin cannot modify Founder/Admin permissions. Founder can modify anyone's permissions. Note: AVAILABLE_PERMISSIONS (186) and ALL_SYSTEM_PERMISSIONS (209) have a mismatch of 23 permissions.
